title: Incarceration without trial is punishment, says Supreme Court; grants bail to accused in jail for two years
description: A bench of Justices Dipankar Datta and P.V. Varale, in its recent order, said Pradeep Kumar alias Banu was booked for various offences, including attempt to murder, in February 2024, but the prosecution is yet to examine any one of the 23 witnesses related to the case
